title: Does Technology Drive Dematerialisation? Software Complexity, Income, and Material Footprint across EU-27 and MERCOSUR-4 — Replication Materials

creators.name: Gómez, Raimundo Elías
creators.affiliation: National Scientific and Technical Research Council (CONICET), Argentina; Institute of Sociology, University of Porto, Portugal

description: Replication materials (data, analysis scripts, and figures) for the article submitted to the Journal of Industrial Ecology (JIE). Includes Material Footprint data, GitHub Innovation Graph indicators, Sequence Analysis of decoupling trajectories (2000–2024), and panel regression models (2000–2021) for 31 countries (EU-27 and MERCOSUR-4).
